summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EPIC7-B: Kas & Bank module. Backend APIs fully functional (35/35 tests passed). Frontend UI working correctly with proper navigation, KPI cards, account cards, ledger panel, add account form, and RBAC enforcement. Minor UI refresh issue on reconcile toggle.

ui_bugs.issue: Reconcile toggle button clicked but visual state doesn't update immediately (text remains 'Tandai' instead of changing to 'Terekonsiliasi')
ui_bugs.note: Backend API works correctly (confirmed in backend tests). Likely a frontend state refresh issue.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/bank-accounts returns 200 with 4+ accounts
Backend: All accounts have required fields (balance, opening_balance, inflow, outflow, txn_count, unreconciled_count, account_type)
Backend: Balance invariant holds (balance == opening_balance + inflow - outflow)
Backend: Kas Kecil KSC balance = 9,750,000
Backend: BCA Operasional KSC balance = 50,000,000 with 0 transactions
Backend: GET /api/bank-accounts/{id}/ledger returns 200 with transactions and running_balance
Backend: Latest transaction running_balance matches account balance
Backend: POST /api/bank-accounts creates account with balance == opening_balance
Backend: POST /api/cash-transactions links transaction to account and updates balance
Backend: POST /api/cash-transactions/{txn_id}/reconcile toggles reconciled state
Backend: PATCH /api/bank-accounts/{id} updates name and is_active
Backend: Manager can access /api/bank-accounts (200)
Backend: Sales cannot access /api/bank-accounts (403)
Backend: Unknown account ledger returns 404
Backend: Unknown transaction reconcile returns 404
Frontend: Admin login successful
Frontend: Navigate to Kas & Bank (KEUANGAN > Kas & Bank)
Frontend: Bank Accounts view loads with data-testid='bank-accounts-view'
Frontend: 4 KPI cards display correctly (bank-kpi-total, bank-kpi-bank, bank-kpi-cash, bank-kpi-unrec)
Frontend: 5 account cards found (including 4 seeded accounts)
Frontend: Kas Kecil KSC account card found
Frontend: BCA Operasional KSC account card found
Frontend: Ledger panel opens when clicking account card
Frontend: Ledger displays 3 transactions with running_balance
Frontend: First transaction running_balance = Rp 9.750.000
Frontend: Ledger panel closes via close button
Frontend: Add account form appears when clicking 'Tambah Akun'
Frontend: Add account form accepts all inputs (name, type, opening balance, bank name, account number)
Frontend: New account card appears after form submission
Frontend: RBAC - Sales user cannot see KEUANGAN group
Frontend: RBAC - Sales user cannot see Kas & Bank menu

success_percentage.frontend: 97% (30/31 tests passed - 1 minor UI refresh issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI issue: Reconcile toggle button in ledger panel doesn't update visual state immediately after clicking. Backend API works correctly. Investigate frontend state management in BankAccountsView.jsx toggleReconcile function - may need to force re-render or update local state after API call.
